description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a modern design, featuring a wood-textured front panel and a matte black body. The front panel displays a chevron wood grain pattern and is fitted with a small, central metallic handle, suggesting a single large drawer. The top, sides, and back are finished in a solid black color, likely powder-coated metal or laminate, giving it a sleek and professional appearance. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy black legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for storing documents or office supplies securely. Its minimalist style and neutral colors make it ideal for contemporary urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or reception areas.
description: A modern, compact filing cabinet with a wood-textured front drawer and a matte black body, standing on four short legs. It features a central metallic handle and a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-textured drawer with a chevron pattern and a central metallic handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid matte black side panel and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain matte black back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a solid matte black panel and visible leg structure.
